title: Repeat breakfast circle reached second session
outcome: Six participants returned for a follow-up breakfast after the first hosted introduction loop.
evidence: Attendance log, participant notes, and one confirmed collaboration follow-up.

title: Domestic courtyard converted into an active node
outcome: A residential venue hosted two gatherings without losing warmth or operational clarity.
evidence: Host feedback, guest confirmations, and documented reuse of the space in the same week.

title: Visitor-to-local introduction produced a concrete next step
outcome: A visiting expert was matched to two local operators and agreed to a follow-on working session.
evidence: Shared notes, confirmed scheduling, and one retained cross-city relationship.
